generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved references reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with expression types.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure AGREE scalar types are `int`, `real`, or `bool`.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to add architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on fixing expressions.
Avoid introducing new unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
